# Total CMS

> Total CMS is a modern, flat-file content management system built with PHP. It uses JSON storage instead of a traditional database, Twig for templating, and provides a comprehensive REST API and admin dashboard.

Total CMS is designed for web designers and developers who want a powerful CMS without database complexity. Content is stored as JSON files, making it easy to version control, backup, and deploy. It runs on any PHP 8.2+ host with no database setup required.

## Key Features

- Flat-file JSON storage (no database required)
- 13 built-in collection types (blog, image, gallery, etc.)
- Twig templating with 50+ custom filters and functions
- Full REST API for headless CMS usage
- Admin dashboard with 20+ form field types
- Image processing with watermarking
- Multi-backend caching (APCu, Redis, Memcached, filesystem)
- Access groups and role-based permissions
- JumpStart data import/export system
- Barcode and QR code generation
- CSV/JSON import and export
- White label admin customization (Pro edition)
- CLI tool for schema, collection, and cache management (Since 3.3.0)
- Extension system for third-party functionality (Since 3.3.0)
- Site Builder for building complete sites with Twig templates and starter scaffolds (Since 3.3.0)
- One-click updates with rollback and maintenance mode (Since 3.3.0)
- Push/pull sync between development and production (Since 3.3.0)

## Documentation

### Start Here
- [Getting Started](https://docs.totalcms.co/getting-started/): Introduction to Total CMS features and quick start guide
- [Installation](https://docs.totalcms.co/installation/): PHP 8.2+ requirements, extensions, and web server setup

### Dashboard
- [Overview](https://docs.totalcms.co/admin/dashboard/): Admin dashboard overview
- [White Label](https://docs.totalcms.co/admin/whitelabel/): Customize the admin interface branding

### Collections
- [Collection Settings](https://docs.totalcms.co/collections/settings/): Configure collection behavior, display, and access control
- [Form Settings](https://docs.totalcms.co/collections/form-settings/): Configure collection form fields and layout
- [Pushover Notifications](https://docs.totalcms.co/notifications/pushover/): Configure Pushover push notifications for form actions with image attachments and delivery groups
- [Importing Data](https://docs.totalcms.co/collections/import/): Import data from CSV and JSON files
- [Exporting Data](https://docs.totalcms.co/collections/export/): Export collection data to CSV and JSON
- [Sitemap Builder](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/sitemap-builder/): Generate XML sitemaps from collections
- [Data Views](https://docs.totalcms.co/collections/data-views/): Create custom filtered views of collection data

### Property Settings
- [All Fields](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/all-fields/): Common settings shared by all property types
- [Card](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/card/): Single-instance nested object that renders another schema as inline sub-fields via schemaref
- [Code](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/code-editor/): Code editor property with syntax highlighting
- [Date](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/date/): Date and datetime property settings
- [Deck](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/deck/): Deck property for repeatable content blocks
- [File & Depot](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/file-depot/): File upload and depot (multi-file) properties
- [ID](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/id/): Auto-generated unique identifier property
- [Image & Gallery](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/image-gallery/): Image upload and gallery properties with processing
- [Lists](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/lists/): List property for ordered items
- [Number & Range](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/number-range/): Numeric and range slider properties
- [Password](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/password/): Secure password property with hashing
- [Price](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/price/): Currency/price property settings
- [Radio & Multicheckbox](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/radio-multicheckbox/): Radio buttons and multi-checkbox properties
- [Secret](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/secret/): Masked text input for plaintext-stored sensitive values like API keys and tokens
- [Select](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/select/): Select and multiselect dropdown properties
- [Styled Text](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/styled-text/): Rich text editor property
- [SVG](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/svg/): SVG upload and display property
- [Text & Textarea](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-settings/text-inputs/): Text input and textarea properties

### Property Options
- [Static Options](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-options/static-options/): Hardcoded option lists for select/radio fields
- [Property Options](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-options/property-options/): Dynamic options from other properties
- [Relational Options](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-options/relational-options/): Options from related collections
- [Sorting Options](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-options/sorting-options/): Configure option sort order
- [Access Group Options](https://docs.totalcms.co/property-options/access-group-options/): Options filtered by access groups

### Schemas
- [Schema Reference](https://docs.totalcms.co/schemas/reference/): Schema settings including inheritance, required fields, indexing, and form grid layout
- [Form Grid Layout](https://docs.totalcms.co/schemas/formgrid/): Arrange form fields in a grid layout using CSS Grid syntax
- [Schema Validation](https://docs.totalcms.co/schemas/validation/): Validate collection data with JSON schemas

### Twig Language
- [Overview](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/overview/): Templating basics with variables, filters, and template inheritance
- [Filters](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/filters/): 50+ filters for text, color, array, date, and markdown processing
- [Functions](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/functions/): Form helpers, math, string utilities, hashing, and media embedding
- [Variables](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/variables/): Global variables available in Twig templates
- [Conditionals](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/conditionals/): Conditional logic and control flow in templates
- [Markdown](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/markdown/): Markdown rendering in Twig templates
- [Factory](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/factory/): Factory pattern for dynamic template generation
- [Templates](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/templates/): Template inheritance and reuse

### CMS Content
- [CMS Content](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/totalcms/): The `cms` global variable reference for collections, objects, and images
- [Collections](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/collections/): Working with collections in Twig templates
- [Collection Filtering](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/collection-filtering/): Filter and sort with comparison operators, date ranges, and ordering
- [Data](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/data/): Accessing and manipulating CMS data in templates
- [Media](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/media/): Working with images, files, and media in templates
- [Render](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/render/): Rendering content and templates
- [ImageWorks](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/imageworks/): Transform images on-the-fly
- [CMS Grid Tag](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/cmsgrid-tag/): Grid layout tag for collection listings
- [Load More](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/load-more/): Paginate collection listings with load more
- [Object Linking](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/object-linking/): Link between collection objects
- [Locale](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/locale/): Locale settings and formatting
- [Localization](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/localization/): Multi-language content support
- [Views](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/views/): Custom views for rendering content
- [QR Codes](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/qrcodes/): Generate QR codes in templates
- [Bar Codes](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/barcodes/): Generate barcodes in templates
- [Utilities](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/utils/): URL-based filtering helpers for query parameter conversion to include, exclude, sort, and search options

### CMS Admin
- [Admin](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/admin/): Admin template functions and variables
- [Auth](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/auth/): Authentication helpers in Twig templates
- [Edition](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/edition/): Edition detection and feature gating
- [Schemas](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/schemas/): Schema helpers in Twig templates
- [Forms Overview](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/forms/overview/): Accessing form methods, field arguments, and premade forms
- [Form Builder](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/forms/builder/): Custom forms with the form builder and simple forms
- [Deck Forms](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/forms/deck/): Create and edit deck property items
- [Form Options](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/forms/options/): General options, behavior, actions, and CSS state classes
- [Field Settings](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/forms/fields/): Image validation, date defaults, and ID auto-generation
- [Select & List Options](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/forms/select-options/): Static, grouped, dynamic, and relational options
- [Validation Patterns](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/forms/patterns/): Built-in validation patterns for form fields
- [Report Form](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/forms/report/): Export collection data as CSV or JSON reports
- [Specialized Forms](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/forms/specialized/): Schema, collection, import, job queue, and factory forms

### Authentication
- [Authentication](https://docs.totalcms.co/auth/auth/): Page lock and authentication system
- [Access Groups](https://docs.totalcms.co/auth/access-groups/): Role-based CRUD permissions for collections and admin access
- [Password Reset](https://docs.totalcms.co/auth/password-reset/): Password reset flow configuration

### API
- [REST API](https://docs.totalcms.co/api/rest-api/): Complete API reference for CRUD operations
- [API Keys](https://docs.totalcms.co/api/api-keys/): API key management and authentication
- [Index Filter](https://docs.totalcms.co/api/index-filter/): Filter API index responses
- [PHP API](https://docs.totalcms.co/api/php-api/): PHP API for server-side integrations
- [Download](https://docs.totalcms.co/api/download/): File download API endpoints

### Site Builder (Since 3.3.0)
- [Overview](https://docs.totalcms.co/builder/overview/): Build complete websites within Total CMS using Twig templates, page routes, and automatic URL routing
- [Frontend Assets](https://docs.totalcms.co/builder/frontend/): Set up Vite (or any build tool) to compile CSS and JavaScript for builder sites
- [Twig Reference](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/builder/): The `cms.builder` namespace for navigation helpers and asset management
- [CLI Commands](https://docs.totalcms.co/builder/cli/): Scaffold sites from starter templates
- [Admin UI](https://docs.totalcms.co/builder/admin/): Manage builder templates, preview pages, and configure page routing from the admin
- [Starter Templates](https://docs.totalcms.co/builder/starters/): Bundled starter templates for business, blog, portfolio, and minimal sites

### Extensions (Since 3.3.0)
- [Extensions Overview](https://docs.totalcms.co/extensions/overview/): Getting started with the extension system, directory structure, and quick example
- [Manifest Reference](https://docs.totalcms.co/extensions/manifest/): Complete extension.json manifest field reference
- [Extension Points](https://docs.totalcms.co/extensions/extension-points/): All 12 extension points: Twig, CLI, routes, events, schemas, widgets, and more
- [Events](https://docs.totalcms.co/extensions/events/): Content event reference with payload schemas and listener isolation
- [Schemas](https://docs.totalcms.co/extensions/schemas/): Read-only and installable schemas from extensions (Pro+ only)

### Behind the Scenes
- [CLI Commands](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/cli/): Command-line interface for schemas, collections, objects, sync, JumpStart, and cache management
- [Search](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/search/): Full-text search configuration
- [JumpStart](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/jumpstart/): Data import/export and site bootstrapping
- [Migration from v1](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/migration-total-cms-one/): Migrate from Total CMS v1
- [Security](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/security/): HTTPS, HTML/SVG sanitization, upload restrictions, and headers
- [Configuration](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/configuration/): Hierarchical PHP settings for all system options
- [Server Sizing](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/server-sizing/): Server requirements and sizing recommendations
- [Sync](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/sync/): Push and pull schemas and templates between development and production
- [Updates](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/updates/): One-click updates, CLI commands, rollback, and maintenance mode
- [Deployment](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/deployment/): Git workflows, cache clearing, and CI/CD integration
- [Filesystem](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/filesystem/): File storage structure and organization
- [Licenses](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/licenses/): License management and editions
- [Data Model](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/data-model/): 13 collection types, 16 property types, and JSON object storage
- [Nginx Configuration](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/nginx/): Configure Nginx for URL rewriting, PHP-FPM, and tcms-data protection

## AI Integration

Total CMS provides an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI coding agents. Configure it once and get accurate Total CMS answers in Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP-compatible tool.

- [Using Total CMS with AI](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/ai-integration/): MCP server setup, configuration, and available tools

**MCP Server:** `https://mcp.totalcms.co/`

Add to your AI tool's MCP config:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "totalcms-docs": {
      "url": "https://mcp.totalcms.co/"
    }
  }
}
```

Available tools: `docs_search`, `docs_twig_function`, `docs_twig_filter`, `docs_field_type`, `docs_api_endpoint`, `docs_schema_config`, `docs_cli_command`, `docs_extension`, `docs_builder`

## Optional

- [Full documentation for LLMs](https://docs.totalcms.co/llms-full.txt)
